title: ctenitis biserialis
intro: Ctenitis biserialis, a species of fern native to tropical Asia, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. Ctenitis biserialis has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing oxidative stress, protecting against cancer, and alleviating symptoms of fever and pain. Traditionally, Ctenitis biserialis is prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, which is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
